title: Segfault running synthesis on Raptor64 CPU core
body:
verilog :) $ gdb yosys -p 'synth_ice40 -top Raptor64 -blif example.blif' Raptor64*.v

```
(gdb) run -p 'synth_ice40 -top Raptor64 -blif example.blif' Raptor64*.v
```
